nodes.name: Schedule: Daily 04:30
nodes.notes:
30 min after Flow 2 (Firecrawl, 04:00). Avoids DB contention.
Scrapes freelance/project platforms for Gewerbe opportunities.

parameters.jsCode:
const QUERIES = [
  // DE freelance platforms
  { q: 'site:freelancermap.de python n8n automation freelance remote', label: 'fm-python-n8n' },
  { q: 'site:freelancermap.de KI LLM Automatisierung freelance remote', label: 'fm-ki-llm' },
  { q: 'site:freelancermap.de Make.com Zapier Automatisierung freelance', label: 'fm-make' },
  { q: 'site:freelancermap.de chatbot KI Assistent freelance remote', label: 'fm-chatbot' },
  { q: 'site:malt.de python automation freelance remote', label: 'malt-python' },
  { q: 'site:malt.de n8n automatisierung freelance', label: 'malt-n8n' },
  { q: 'site:freelance.de python automation remote freelance', label: 'fd-python' },
  { q: 'site:gulp.de python automation remote', label: 'gulp-python' },
  // DE/EU job boards
  { q: 'site:jobs-im-suedwesten.de AI automation engineer remote', label: 'jisw-ai' },
  { q: 'site:talents.studysmarter.de AI engineer remote vollzeit teilzeit', label: 'studysmart-ai' },
  { q: 'site:hokify.de AI automation engineer remote', label: 'hokify-ai' },
  { q: 'site:remote3.co AI engineer automation remote web3', label: 'remote3-web3' },
  // EU remote job boards
  { q: 'site:remoteok.com python automation AI engineer remote europe', label: 'remoteok-ai' },
  { q: 'site:weworkremotely.com python automation AI engineer', label: 'wwr-ai' },
  { q: 'site:remotive.com python automation AI remote europe', label: 'remotive-ai' },
  { q: 'site:wellfound.com AI automation engineer remote europe', label: 'wellfound-ai' },
  { q: 'site:arc.dev python automation AI remote', label: 'arcdev-ai' },
  { q: 'site:flexjobs.com python automation AI remote europe', label: 'flexjobs-ai' },
  { q: 'site:jobspresso.co python automation AI remote', label: 'jobspresso-ai' },
  { q: 'site:dynamitejobs.com python automation AI remote', label: 'dynamite-ai' },
  { q: 'site:nodesk.co python automation AI remote', label: 'nodesk-ai' },
  { q: 'site:justremote.co python automation AI engineer', label: 'justremote-ai' },
  { q: 'site:workingnomads.com python automation AI remote', label: 'worknomads-ai' },
  { q: 'site:authenticjobs.com python automation developer remote', label: 'authentic-ai' },
  { q: 'site:jobrack.eu python automation AI developer remote', label: 'jobrack-ai' },
  { q: 'site:web3.career python automation AI remote', label: 'web3career-ai' },
  { q: 'site:jobgether.com python automation AI remote europe', label: 'jobgether-ai' },
  { q: 'site:builtin.com python automation AI remote', label: 'builtin-ai' },
  // US contractor (Gewerbe invoice, no visa)
  { q: 'site:toptal.com python automation AI freelance', label: 'toptal-ai' },
  { q: 'site:turing.com python automation AI remote', label: 'turing-ai' },
  { q: 'site:gun.io python automation freelance', label: 'gunio-ai' },
  { q: 'site:contra.com python automation AI freelance', label: 'contra-ai' },
  { q: 'site:lemon.io python automation AI developer', label: 'lemon-ai' },
];
return QUERIES.map(q => ({ json: q }));

nodes.name: Search Queries
nodes.notes:
Freelance project platforms. Edit URLs / add targets here.
All scraped via Jina AI (GET r.jina.ai/{url}) - free, no API key.

nodes.name: SerpAPI: Google Jobs
nodes.notes:
FREE - no API key required, no credit limit.
r.jina.ai renders JS and returns clean markdown.

nodes.name: Add Label
nodes.notes:
Normalises Jina response to {success, data.markdown, data.metadata}.
Downstream nodes treat Jina and Firecrawl output identically.

nodes.name: Expand: Job Results
nodes.notes:
Splits listing pages into individual project items per platform.
If no individual links found - passes full page to LLM.
Fallback: LLM extracts top project from the markdown.

nodes.name: Normalize Item
nodes.notes:
job_type = 'freelance' - stored in DB, filters Gewerbe from employment.
source_detail = 'gewerbe_scraped' for audit trail.

parameters.jsCode:
const ni = $('Normalize Item').item.json.normalized_input;
return { json: { normalized_input: ni, hard_injection_detected: 'no' } };

nodes.name: Skip Security Checks
nodes.notes:
Trusted URLs from our config. No sender domain to verify.
Injection check runs inside LLM via system prompt.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen/qwen3-30b-a3b-instruct-2507', max_tokens: 2048, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $env.JOBRADAR_SYSTEM_PROMPT }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.normalized_input) }] }) }}

parameters.query:
WITH
co AS (
  INSERT INTO companies (company_id, name, meta)
  VALUES ({{ $json.db.company_id_sql }}, {{ $json.db.company_name_sql }}, '{}')
  ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, company_id) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
),
em AS (
  INSERT INTO employers (employer_id, company_id, name)
  SELECT {{ $json.db.employer_id_sql }},
         {{ $json.db.company_id_sql }},
         {{ $json.db.employer_name_sql }}
  WHERE  {{ $json.db.employer_id_sql }} IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, employer_id) DO UPDATE SET
    name       = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.name, employers.name),
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
),
j AS (
  INSERT INTO jobs (
    job_id_fuzzy,   company_id,      employer_id,
    job_title,      location,        seniority,
    work_mode,      work_mode_raw,   working_hours,
    salary_currency, salary_min,     salary_max,     salary_period,
    tech_stack,     key_requirements,
    current_stage,  priority,        priority_level,
    interview_date, response_deadline, application_deadline,
    has_had_call,   call_count,      last_call_date,
    source_url,     source_input,    summary,
    job_type
  ) VALUES (
    {{ $json.db.job_id_fuzzy_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.company_id_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.employer_id_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.job_title_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.location_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.seniority_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.work_mode_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.work_mode_raw_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.working_hours_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.salary_currency_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.salary_min_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.salary_max_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.salary_period_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.tech_stack_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.key_requirements_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.current_stage_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.priority_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.priority_level_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.interview_date_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.response_deadline_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.application_deadline_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.has_had_call_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.call_count_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.last_call_date_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.source_url_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.source_input_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.summary_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.job_type_sql }}
  )
  ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, job_id_fuzzy) DO UPDATE SET
    current_stage        = EXCLUDED.current_stage,
    priority             = EXCLUDED.priority,
    priority_level       = EXCLUDED.priority_level,
    interview_date       = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.interview_date, jobs.interview_date),
    response_deadline    = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.response_deadline, jobs.response_deadline),
    application_deadline = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.application_deadline, jobs.application_deadline),
    tech_stack           = CASE WHEN array_length(EXCLUDED.tech_stack, 1) > 0
                                THEN EXCLUDED.tech_stack ELSE jobs.tech_stack END,
    source_url           = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.source_url, jobs.source_url),
    summary              = EXCLUDED.summary,
    job_type             = EXCLUDED.job_type,
    updated_at           = NOW()
  RETURNING id, job_id_fuzzy, current_stage::text, priority::text, summary, interview_date
),
ev AS (
  INSERT INTO job_events (
    job_id,         job_thread_key,  job_id_fuzzy,
    input_source,   source_detail,
    category,       is_job_related,  action,
    stage,          priority,        priority_level,
    interview_date, response_deadline, application_deadline,
    call_platform,  call_platform_raw,
    raw_text,       parsed_json,
    sender_risk_level, sender_risk_signals
  )
  SELECT
    (SELECT id FROM j),
    {{ $json.db.job_thread_key_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.job_id_fuzzy_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.source_input_sql }},
    'gewerbe_scraped',
    {{ $json.db.category_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.is_job_related_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.action_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.current_stage_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.priority_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.priority_level_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.interview_date_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.response_deadline_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.application_deadline_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.call_platform_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.call_platform_raw_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.raw_text_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.parsed_json_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.sender_risk_level_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.sender_risk_signals_sql }}
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT id             FROM j) AS job_id,
  (SELECT job_id_fuzzy   FROM j) AS job_id_fuzzy,
  (SELECT current_stage  FROM j) AS stage,
  (SELECT priority       FROM j) AS priority,
  (SELECT summary        FROM j) AS summary,
  (SELECT interview_date FROM j) AS interview_date,
  (SELECT id             FROM ev) AS event_id;

nodes.name: DB: Write All
nodes.notes:
Idempotent upsert. job_type='freelance' stored permanently.
source_detail='gewerbe_scraped' in job_events for audit.

nodes.name: Prepare Calendar Data
nodes.notes:
Builds structured Gewerbe project card for Google Calendar.
Colors: green=hot(?80) / yellow=mid(50-79) / graphite=low(<50)
Title includes job title, company and rate/budget if available.
Description = full KI Automation project card with relevance bar.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_GEWERBE_CHAT_ID, parse_mode: 'HTML', text: ['\u{1F4BC} Gewerbe-Radar: ' + ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.company_name || 'Unknown') + '', ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.job_title || '\u2014'), '', 'Stage: ' + ($('Prepare Calendar Data').item.json.stage || '') + ' Priority: ' + ($('Prepare Calendar Data').item.json.priority || '') + '', '', ($json.summary || '')].join('\n'), disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}

Create Telegram channel -> forward any message to @userinfobot to get chat_id.
Add bot as admin to the channel first.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ parent: { database_id: 'afdb636cbdec4acba678c95df96b01e1' }, properties: { 'Projekt': { title: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.job_title || 'Unbekannt').slice(0,100) } }] }, 'Kunde': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.company_name || '').slice(0,200) } }] }, 'Typ': { select: { name: 'Freelance' } }, 'Budget': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: (String($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_min || '') + ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_max ? '-' + $('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_max : '') + ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_currency ? ' ' + $('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_currency : '')).trim().slice(0,200) } }] }, 'Standort': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.location || '').slice(0,200) } }] }, 'Link': { url: $('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.source_url || null }, 'Notizen': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.summary || '').slice(0,2000) } }] }, 'Status': { select: { name: 'Neu' } }, 'Quelle': { select: { name: 'Scraper' } } } }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET contact_email = {{ $('Prepare DB Params').item.json.db.contact_email_sql }} WHERE id = '{{ $json.job_id }}'::uuid AND contact_email IS NULL;

nodes.name: Ashby: 10x.team
nodes.notes: Ashby public job board API — 10x.team (freelance AI trainer contracts, remote). No API key needed.

nodes.name: Flatten: Ashby 10xteam
nodes.notes: Maps Ashby jobs to SerpAPI result shape {result:{title,link,snippet},label} → reuses Normalize Item + full downstream pipeline. Cap 30 newest to limit LLM calls.

nodes.name: BA: Suchanfragen
nodes.notes: Arbeitsagentur Jobsuche API. angebotsart=34 Praktikum/Trainee, =1 Arbeit; arbeitszeit=ho Homeoffice.

nodes.name: BA: Suche
nodes.notes: Public static clientId per bund.dev docs — not a secret.

nodes.name: BA: Map Result
nodes.notes: Email regex over the whole details JSON — the 'Bewerbung per E-Mail:' line is picked up downstream by Prepare DB Params contact_email extraction.

nodes.name: BA: Dedup New Only
nodes.notes: COST SAVER: drops already-ingested BA jobs before LLM (dedup by jobdetail URL).

nodes.name: GJobs: Suchanfragen
nodes.notes: SerpAPI engine=google_jobs — indexes Praktikum.info, corporate career pages, StepStone etc. location=Germany required (query alone returns 0).
